query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.departamentoId, u.leaderId, u.status, l.name as liderNome FROM users u LEFT JOIN users l ON u.leaderId = l.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%RAFAEL%' OR u.name LIKE '%Rafael%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.departamentoId, u.leaderId, u.status, l.name as liderNome FROM users u LEFT JOIN users l ON u.leaderId = l.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%RAFAEL%' OR u.name LIKE '%Rafael%'
